ORDER RE: EX PARTE TO ENTER JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORSCH, BRANDON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1476 GROVE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC (CONDITIONAL JUDGMENT)
